metadata.description: Tailor ATS-ready resumes and cover letters to a job posting, grounded in a master profile and verified by a second-model review.

plugins.name: resume-tailor
plugins.description: Turns a job posting into a tailored, ATS-ready resume + cover letter (PDF and plain-text), grounded in a MASTER-PROFILE.md fact sheet and verified by a read-only codex review. Anti-fabrication gate asks before claiming anything not in the profile. Supports standard tech ATS and government/competency-based formats.
